requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency Labelling — NEEAP / ECN / NERC Programme
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签——NEEAP / ECN / NERC计划
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤——NEEAP / ECN / NERC計劃

summary.en: Nigeria's National Energy Efficiency Action Plan (NEEAP), coordinated by the Energy Commission of Nigeria (ECN) and the Nigerian Electricity Regulatory Commission (NERC), establishes an energy efficiency label programme targeting air conditioners and major electrical appliances. Under the NEEAP framework, air conditioners and heat pumps may be required to carry an energy efficiency label specifying rated capacity, energy efficiency ratio (EER) or coefficient of performance (COP), and energy consumption class. The programme aligns with ECOWAS regional energy efficiency directives.
summary.zh: 尼日利亚国家能效行动计划（NEEAP）由尼日利亚能源委员会（ECN）和尼日利亚电力监管委员会（NERC）协调推进，建立面向空调器及主要家用电器的能效标签计划。在NEEAP框架下，空调器和热泵可能须张贴能效标签，注明额定容量、能效比（EER）或性能系数（COP）以及能效等级。该计划与西非国家经济共同体地区能效指令接轨。
summary.zht: 尼日利亞國家能效行動計劃（NEEAP）由尼日利亞能源委員會（ECN）和尼日利亞電力監管委員會（NERC）協調推進，建立面向空調器及主要家用電器的能效標籤計劃。在NEEAP框架下，空調器和熱泵可能須張貼能效標籤，注明額定容量、能效比（EER）或性能系數（COP）以及能效等級。該計劃與西非國家經濟共同體地區能效指令接軌。

standards_or_laws: Nigeria National Energy Efficiency Action Plan (NEEAP)
Energy Commission of Nigeria Act (ECN Act)
Nigerian Electricity Regulatory Commission (NERC) directives on appliance energy efficiency

summary.en: China requires the China Energy Label (CEL) for air conditioners and heat pumps under the Energy Efficiency Labelling Management Measures administered jointly by NDRC and SAMR. Energy efficiency is rated by SEER (seasonal) or COP/EER (single-point) in accordance with GB 21455 and GB/T 7725. The China Energy Label is a domestic market requirement and is not recognised as equivalent to any Nigerian energy efficiency label.
summary.zh: 中国依据国家发展改革委与国家市场监督管理总局联合主管的《能效标识管理办法》，对空调器和热泵强制要求粘贴中国能效标识（CEL）。能效依据GB 21455和GB/T 7725，按SEER（季节性）或COP/EER（单点）评定。中国能效标识属于中国国内市场要求，不被视为等同于任何尼日利亚能效标签。
summary.zht: 中國依據國家發展改革委與國家市場監督管理總局聯合主管的《能效標識管理辦法》，對空調器和熱泵強制要求粘貼中國能效標識（CEL）。能效依據GB 21455和GB/T 7725，按SEER（季節性）或COP/EER（單點）評定。中國能效標識屬於中國國內市場要求，不被視為等同於任何尼日利亞能效標籤。

standards_or_laws: 能效标识管理办法 (Energy Efficiency Labelling Management Measures)
GB 21455 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for room air conditioners)
GB/T 7725 (Room air conditioners — performance requirements and test methods)
GB 25454 (Heat pump water heaters — COP performance baseline)

gap.en: The NEEAP energy efficiency label programme is still being rolled out; mandatory applicability and enforcement timelines for heat pumps should be confirmed with ECN and NERC at the time of export. China Energy Label data (EER/COP ratings) may provide supporting documentation, but a Nigeria-compliant label referencing the applicable NIS standard and NERC/ECN programme requirements is likely needed for market access.
gap.zh: NEEAP能效标签计划仍在推进落地；热泵的强制适用性和执法时间表须在出口时向ECN和NERC核实。中国能效标识数据（EER/COP额定值）可作为辅助文件，但进入市场可能需要符合尼日利亚要求、引用适用NIS标准及NERC/ECN计划要求的标签。
gap.zht: NEEAP能效標籤計劃仍在推進落地；熱泵的強制適用性和執法時間表須在出口時向ECN和NERC核實。中國能效標識數據（EER/COP額定值）可作為輔助文件，但進入市場可能需要符合尼日利亞要求、引用適用NIS標準及NERC/ECN計劃要求的標籤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under NEEAP for listed appliance categories; confirm current enforcement scope with ECN / NERC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (China Energy Label under 能效标识管理办法); not recognised as equivalent in Nigeria

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap likely — NEEAP energy efficiency label requirements for air conditioners and heat pumps should be confirmed with ECN and NERC; China Energy Label is not recognised as equivalent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 可能存在差距——空调器和热泵的NEEAP能效标签要求须向ECN和NERC核实；中国能效标识不被视为等效。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 可能存在差距——空調器和熱泵的NEEAP能效標籤要求須向ECN和NERC核實；中國能效標識不被視為等效。

requirement_topic.en: Electrical Supply Compatibility — 240 V / 415 V, 50 Hz (Nigeria Grid)
requirement_topic.zh: 电源兼容性——240 V / 415 V，50 Hz（尼日利亚电网）
requirement_topic.zht: 電源相容性——240 V / 415 V，50 Hz（尼日利亞電網）

summary.en: Nigeria operates a 240 V single-phase / 415 V three-phase, 50 Hz grid regulated by NERC. Heat pumps and air conditioners must be rated for 240 V (±10%) 50 Hz single-phase or 415 V three-phase operation as applicable. The 50 Hz frequency is identical to China, but Nigeria's single-phase nominal voltage (240 V) is higher than China's (220 V). Units rated only for 220 V may exceed permissible voltage tolerance on the Nigerian grid and must be adapted or re-rated before export.
summary.zh: 尼日利亚采用240 V单相/415 V三相、50 Hz电网（由NERC监管）。热泵和空调器须额定适用于240 V（±10%）50 Hz单相或415 V三相供电。50 Hz频率与中国相同，但尼日利亚单相额定电压（240 V）高于中国（220 V）。仅额定220 V的设备在尼日利亚电网上可能超出允许电压容差，出口前须适配或重新额定。
summary.zht: 尼日利亞採用240 V單相/415 V三相、50 Hz電網（由NERC監管）。熱泵和空調器須額定適用於240 V（±10%）50 Hz單相或415 V三相供電。50 Hz頻率與中國相同，但尼日利亞單相額定電壓（240 V）高於中國（220 V）。僅額定220 V的設備在尼日利亞電網上可能超出允許電壓容差，出口前須適配或重新額定。

standards_or_laws: NERC Grid Code (Nigerian Electricity Regulatory Commission)
NIS IEC 60038 adopted voltage standard (240 V single-phase / 415 V three-phase, 50 Hz)
SON / NIS appliance voltage rating requirements

summary.en: China's standard residential supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Heat pumps designed and labelled for the Chinese market are rated at 220 V (or 380 V three-phase) 50 Hz. The frequency (50 Hz) is identical to Nigeria, but the voltage nominal differs: 220 V vs Nigeria's 240 V single-phase, and 380 V vs Nigeria's 415 V three-phase.
summary.zh: 中国标准居民用电为220 V单相/380 V三相、50 Hz。为中国市场设计和标注的热泵额定为220 V（或380 V三相）50 Hz。频率（50 Hz）与尼日利亚相同，但额定电压不同：单相220 V对比尼日利亚240 V，三相380 V对比尼日利亚415 V。
summary.zht: 中國標準居民用電為220 V單相/380 V三相、50 Hz。為中國市場設計和標注的熱泵額定為220 V（或380 V三相）50 Hz。頻率（50 Hz）與尼日利亞相同，但額定電壓不同：單相220 V對比尼日利亞240 V，三相380 V對比尼日利亞415 V。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 156 (Standard voltages — China: 220 V / 380 V, 50 Hz)
GB/T 7725 (Room air conditioners — performance rated at 220 V 50 Hz)
GB 25454 (Heat pump water heaters — rated at 220 V 50 Hz)

gap.en: Frequency (50 Hz) is identical so no frequency adaptation is required. The 20 V nominal voltage difference (220 V vs 240 V, single-phase) may fall within a unit's operational voltage tolerance range, but exporters must verify rated voltage tolerance against Nigeria's 240 V supply before shipment. Units must be labelled with the correct rated voltage for the Nigerian market. Three-phase units (380 V CN vs 415 V NG) require similar verification.
gap.zh: 频率（50 Hz）完全相同，无需频率适配。20 V标称电压差（单相220 V对比240 V）可能在设备工作电压容差范围内，但出口商须在装运前核验额定电压容差是否覆盖尼日利亚的240 V供电。设备须标注适用于尼日利亚市场的正确额定电压。三相设备（中国380 V对比尼日利亚415 V）须进行类似核验。
gap.zht: 頻率（50 Hz）完全相同，無需頻率適配。20 V標稱電壓差（單相220 V對比240 V）可能在設備工作電壓容差範圍內，但出口商須在裝運前核驗額定電壓容差是否覆蓋尼日利亞的240 V供電。設備須標注適用於尼日利亞市場的正確額定電壓。三相設備（中國380 V對比尼日利亞415 V）須進行類似核驗。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — equipment must be rated and labelled for 240 V / 415 V 50 Hz for Nigeria market
mandatory_status.cn: 220 V / 380 V 50 Hz domestic market rating; voltage tolerance verification required for Nigeria

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Minor-to-moderate gap — 50 Hz frequency identical; single-phase voltage 220 V (CN) vs 240 V (NG) requires tolerance verification and correct market labelling; three-phase 380 V vs 415 V requires similar check.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 小至中度差距——50 Hz频率相同；单相电压220 V（中国）对比240 V（尼日利亚）须核验容差并正确标注市场额定值；三相380 V对比415 V须进行类似核验。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 小至中度差距——50 Hz頻率相同；單相電壓220 V（中國）對比240 V（尼日利亞）須核驗容差並正確標注市場額定值；三相380 V對比415 V須進行類似核驗。
